Most product pages don’t have a product problem.

They have a presentation problem.

Unclear descriptions, weak structure, and a layout that doesn’t guide the customer properly are what stop people from buying.

Who this is for

This is for businesses with product pages that:

  • Feel flat or unclear
  • Don’t convert as well as they should
  • Don’t reflect the quality of the product

Why VerbaForgeJ

Focused on one thing — improving how product pages look, read, and convert.

Most product pages don’t fail because the product is bad. They fail because the page doesn’t communicate value clearly enough.

Make the product feel more valuable

Stronger wording and structure change how the product is perceived.

Reduce confusion

Clear copy makes it easier to understand what the product is and why it matters.

Increase trust

A cleaner, more polished page is easier to believe and buy from.

Pricing

Every product page is different, so pricing depends on what needs improving.

Some pages only need stronger descriptions. Others need a full improvement across copy and structure.

Send your product page and I’ll take a look — then give you a clear price based on what will actually improve it.

Most projects fall between £30–£80 depending on what needs improving.

Process

Simple process

Clear, direct, and focused on improving your page quickly.

1

Send your product page

I review what’s holding it back.

2

You get improved copy, a cleaner layout direction, or both.

3

Upgrade the page

Your product page becomes clearer, more premium, and easier to buy from.
